t_ch: 迷迷想想办法！
t_en: Mem, hurry and think of a way!

t_ch: 真拿你没办法…人家记得这里的士兵都是靠殿中的「神性」驱动的，但好像储存神性的雕像都没启动……
t_en: You're hopeless... I remember that the soldiers here rely on the "divinity" within the shrine to function, but it seems none of the statues storing divinity are activated...

t_ch: 它们手中的剑应该就是传递神性的媒介，试着让这几个大家伙把剑插下去吧！
t_en: The swords they're holding should be the medium for transmitting divinity. Let's see what happens when these big guys stick their swords in!

t_ch: 这尊雕像摆出健美的姿势，死死压住了你开拓的道路。
t_en: This statue strikes a bodybuilding pose, obstructing your Trailblaze path.

t_ch: 希望在你的生活中，没有这么沉重的东西压在你的心头。
t_en: You can't help but wish no such heavy burdens were weighing you down in life.

t_ch: 她死了…不，它或许并没有死亡的概念，只是回到了那本就永恒的安眠中。在那安眠里，没有浪漫与纷争。
t_en: She's dead... No, perhaps death doesn't even exist for her. She has merely returned to an eternal slumber, a place untouched by romance or conflict.

t_ch: 这里应该就是缇宝说的地方了，但你就连那位大预言家的一根头发都没见着。
t_en: This should be the place that Tribbie mentioned, but you don't even glimpse a hair of that great soothsayer.

t_ch: 太懈怠了，奥赫玛人！刻法勒没教你们准时劳作的美德吗？
t_en: You Okhemans are so slothful! Has Kephale never taught you the virtue of punctuality in your labors?

t_ch: 根据相对认知学派提出的等待第一定律，当你在进行无谓的等待时，大脑体验到的相对时间将会呈现指数提升的状态。
t_en: According to the School of Relative Cognition's First Law of Waiting, when you wait without purpose, the relative time your brain experiences will experience a state of exponential increase.

t_ch: 你决定给大脑做一点热身运动，消磨这无趣的时间。{NICKNAME}，还记得我们要找谁吗？
t_en: You decide to give your brain some exercise and pass the time. You remember who we're looking for, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 帕西提亚。
t_en: Pasithea.

t_ch: 希帕提亚。
t_en: Hypatia.

t_ch: 帕提维娅。
t_en: Patavia.

t_ch: 不知道呀。
t_en: I have no idea.

t_ch: 答得漂亮！你已经成功把自己的大脑变得晕晕乎乎的。根据等待第二定律，你对时间的感知将会加快到光速的<unbreak>99</unbreak>％。
t_en: Nice answer! You managed to get yourself all dizzy. According to the Second Law of Waiting, your perception of time will be accelerated to <unbreak>99%</unbreak> the speed of light.

t_ch: 当然，以上全都是相对认知学派瞎编的。
t_en: Of course, the above was all made up by the School of Relative Cognition.

t_ch: 你耍我！
t_en: You were pulling my leg!

t_ch: 球棒侠，愤怒了！
t_en: The Baseballer is angry!

t_ch: 旁白，这并不好笑。
t_en: Narrator, that's not funny at all.

t_ch: 与其守株待兔，不如主动出击。去问问周围的市民，有没有帕西提亚的线索吧。
t_en: Rather than waiting around, why not catch the early worm? Ask around for Pasithea's sightings.

t_ch: 这位外邦的朋友，看你在那儿等了许久，想必也是来向传谕梦母寻求谕示的吧？
t_en: Outlander friend, I see you've been waiting long. You must be seeking a prophecy from the Oracle Dreammother?

t_ch: 你知道她去哪儿了吗？
t_en: Do you know where she has gone?

t_ch: 靠，不会要排队吧？
t_en: Ugh, don't tell me there's a queue.

t_ch: 你好，帕西提亚。
t_en: Hello, Pasithea.

t_ch: 我哪儿能和「传谕梦母」相提并论？和她的睿智相比，我不过是瑟希斯森林里的一片叶子而已。
t_en: How would I dare be mentioned on equal stature with the Oracle Dreammother? In the presence of her erudition, I am but a leaf in Cerces' forest.

t_ch: 不要慌张，请允许我们占用你的一点时间，为你介绍帕西提亚——我们的先知。
t_en: Don't panic. Please allow us a moment of your time to introduce Pasithea — our prophet.

t_ch: 没人知晓她的过去，她从雅努萨波利斯的废墟里出现，带领逃难的人们穿过黑潮。
t_en: None knows of her past. She emerged from the ruins of Janusopolis, leading refugees across the black tide.

t_ch: 她从梦中解读出未来的轨迹，选中那些被命运所昭示的人，给予他们谕示，指点迷津。
t_en: She foresaw the trails of the future in her dreams, and hand-picked those summoned by destiny, bestowing prophecies upon them, to guide the lost through the fog.

t_ch: 因她那双失明的眼睛，我们甚至一度怀疑，她也是黄金裔的一员。要不，就是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
t_en: We even once suspected her to be one of the Chrysos Heirs because of her blind eyes. Either that, or one of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin.

t_ch: 你们怎么跟剧团似的？
t_en: You sound a lot like a drama troupe.

t_ch: 唱得再顺溜我也不给钱哈。
t_en: I'm not paying a dime, even if your singing is fantastic.

t_ch: 不要破坏本作的科幻世界观了！
t_en: Stop ruining the sci-fi theme of this story!

t_ch: 总之，她是个好人。要不是她提醒我早些回家，我的女儿就要被大火带去{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的国度了。
t_en: Anyway, she's a good person. If she didn't remind me to return home earlier, my daughter would have been summoned to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos'{RUBY_E#} kingdom by the fire.

t_ch: 她还曾让一位老人在耕耘月的头天到奥赫玛的城门边去，在那儿，他找到了在战争里失散的两个兄弟。
t_en: She even had an old person go to Okhema's city gates on the first day of the Month of Cultivation. There, he found the two brothers he thought lost during the war.

t_ch: 所以你们到底有没有见过她？
t_en: Have you even seen her before?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 别心急，只要跟随命运的指引，您一定能见到帕西提亚女士的。
t_en: Don't be anxious. As long as you follow the guidance of destiny, you will surely encounter Lady Pasithea.

t_ch: 哼，又一个被那骗子糊弄来的傻子，在你被她耍得晕头转向前，我奉劝你一句——还是去洗把脸，清醒清醒为好。
t_en: Hmph, another fool misled by that charlatan. Before you get scammed upside down by her, a word of advice — go wash your face and clear your mind.

t_ch: 你有见过她吗？
t_en: Have you seen her before?

t_ch: 我已经洗过脸了。
t_en: I've already washed my face.

t_ch: 你是不是听不懂人话？我是叫你别信那些鬼话，所谓预言，不过是些好听的谎话罢了。
t_en: Are you deaf or dumb? I'm telling you not to listen to that drivel. So-called prophecies are nothing but honeyed lies.

t_ch: 你好，帕西提亚。
t_en: Hello, Pasithea.

t_ch: 啧，难怪蠢到会相信所谓的传谕梦母，看来你的眼睛也和她一样不好使。
t_en: Tsk, no wonder you're foolish enough to believe this supposed Oracle Dreammother — your eyes are just as useless as hers.

t_ch: 想见帕西提亚的话，已经晚了。我来的时候，刚巧看见那家伙被圣城卫士们抓走。
t_en: It'll be too late if you want to meet Pasithea. When I arrived, I happened to witness the city guards escorting that scoundrel away.

t_ch: 这么多年了，总算有聪明人戳穿了她的把戏。
t_en: So many years, and someone smart finally saw through her tricks.

t_ch: 这算幸灾乐祸吗？
t_en: Is this what schadenfreude means?

t_ch: 其实我也一直持怀疑态度。
t_en: I've also been suspicious, actually.

t_ch: 怎么不让我来戳穿！
t_en: Why couldn't I be the one who thwarted her!

t_ch: 早在雅努萨波利斯还未毁灭的时候，命运三相殿里的祭司就常常杜撰神谕，和那些该死的政治家狼狈为奸。
t_en: Before Janusopolis was destroyed, the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates frequently concocted prophecies, colluding with those scummy politicians.

t_ch: 为了利益，他们甚至可以篡改{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神谕。
t_en: They would even distort {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} prophecies for their own gains.

t_ch: 也只有这些没有经历过那个时代的家伙，才会相信一个来历不明的瞎子口中的预言。
t_en: Only people who have never experienced those times would believe the foretellings of a blind from dubious origins.

t_ch: 男人骂骂咧咧地陈述着过去祭司们的种种罪行，时而愤怒，时而流泪。
t_en: The ranting man details the various crimes of past priests, sometimes in anger, sometimes in tears.

t_ch: 在他的情绪彻底失控前，还是赶紧离开，去找抓走帕西提亚的圣城卫士问问情况好了。
t_en: You'd better leave before he gets hysterical. Better go look for the city guards who detained Pasithea and ask about the situation.

t_ch: 这不是阿格莱雅大人的客人吗？到这儿来有何贵干？
t_en: Isn't this Lady Aglaea's guest? What matter of business do you have here?

t_ch: 初次见面，帕西提亚。
t_en: An honor to meet you, Pasithea.

t_ch: 阁下，您看我这五大三粗的样子，胡子都没刮干净，怎么也和那什么梦母不沾边吧？
t_en: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, just look at my burly build. I didn't even shave properly. How can I possibly be associated with that Dreammother?

t_ch: 我来找帕西提亚。
t_en: I'm looking for Pasithea.

t_ch: 帕西提亚，我来救你！
t_en: Pasithea, I'm here to save you!

t_ch: 阁下，我想您多半是误会了。
t_en: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, I think you're mistaken.

t_ch: 要找帕西提亚女士的话，她已经离开了，看她心事重重的样子，多半又是那个梦的缘故。
t_en: If you're looking for Lady Pasithea, she has left. Judging by her troubled look, it's likely caused by that dream.

t_ch: 也怪我们，时常劳烦她协助我们的工作，但能为她做的事却寥寥无几。「雅努萨波利斯的幽灵」…如果能抓到它就好了。
t_en: It's also our fault, as we often trouble her to assist us for our work, yet we can hardly help her when it comes to her work. Janusopolis' Ghost... It would be great if we can catch it.

t_ch: 幽灵？
t_en: Ghost?

t_ch: 这我熟，要抓鬼吗？
t_en: I'm familiar with this. Are we going ghostbusting?

t_ch: 唉，您就别取笑我们了。
t_en: *sigh* Please don't tease us.

t_ch: 说起这个「幽灵」，我和它也算是老相识了。
t_en: Speaking of this "ghost," you could say it and I are old acquaintances.

t_ch: 黑潮降临时，父亲带着我逃了出来。然而，危险远比我们预料的更多。
t_en: When the black tide descended, my father took me and escaped. But, the danger was greater than we could ever imagine.

t_ch: 同行的人一个个都消失在黑暗里，饥饿、恐惧逐渐成为绝望。可这时，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属却出现在我们面前。
t_en: The people with us disappeared one by one in the darkness. Hunger and fear gradually turned into despair. But then, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Titankin appeared in front of us.

t_ch: 它说，在残破的命运三相殿里，一位名为帕西提亚的先知在等待着我们，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引我们抵达奥赫玛。
t_en: It said that, within the dilapidated Temple of the Three Fates, a prophet named Pasithea was waiting for us. She will bring a prophecy from the Fate Titans, leading us to Okhema.

t_ch: 后来发生的一切，恰如这位眷属所言。我们在废墟里找到了她，而她用预言救了我们。
t_en: Whatever happened next was exactly what the Titankin said. We found her among the ruins, and she saved us with her prophecy.

t_ch: 这幽灵人还怪好的。
t_en: This ghostly person seems quite nice.

t_ch: 故事的画风都变了。
t_en: The tone of the story has shifted.

t_ch: 这不是很正能量吗？
t_en: Isn't this a really positive vibe?

t_ch: 倘若事情结束在这里也罢，可自那以后，帕西提亚便常常在梦中听见它的声音。年复一年，如同一个缠着她的幽灵。
t_en: If things just ended there, it would have been fine. But since then, Pasithea often hears its voice in her dreams. Year after year, it's like a ghost haunting her.

t_ch: 我们也试过回到命运重渊，寻找那位眷属，但永远是一无所获。
t_en: We've also tried returning to the Abyss of Fate, looking for that Titankin, but it was all in vain.

t_ch: 可能另有隐情吧…
t_en: There may be another hidden reason...

t_ch: 真是反反又复复啊。
t_en: So many twists and turns.

t_ch: 我汗毛立起来了。
t_en: I've gotten goosebumps.

t_ch: 来到奥赫玛后，帕西提亚女士很快融入了进来。她为被命运选中的人们提供帮助，也会例行给予我们一些谕示，就像今天这样。
t_en: After arriving at Okhema, Lady Pasithea quickly integrated herself. She offers her help to those chosen by destiny and routinely bestows her prophecies on us, just like today.

t_ch: 被怪物袭击的同胞，迷失的逃难者，迄今为止，许多人因她的预言活了下来。
t_en: Citizens that were attacked by monsters, lost refugees... So far, many have been saved by her prophecies.

t_ch: 即便有人因为没被选中而诋毁她，说她是骗子，也只是一笑置之。唉，要是我能替她分担一些烦忧就好了——闲聊就到此为止吧。
t_en: Even if people slandered her and called her a liar because they weren't chosen, she just laughed it off. *sigh* If only I could share some of her burdens — let's stop the chit-chat here.

t_ch: 如果您是来寻求神谕的，还是改日为好——没能见到她，本身就是一种命运。
t_en: If you're here seeking a prophecy, it's better to do it some other day — it's probably fate's decree that you're not being able to meet her.

t_ch: 虽然偷窥别人的过去不太礼貌，但仔细想想，类似的事情你干的也不少。
t_en: Though it's not polite to snoop into others' past, but if you think about it, you've done plenty of that too.

t_ch: 况且，想要找到帕西提亚，现在就只剩这一条路了。
t_en: Besides, if you want to locate Pasithea, this is the only way left.

t_ch: 我特殊召唤迷迷登场。
t_en: I will Special Summon Mem to the battlefield.

t_ch: 不知道为什么，总感觉有点不爽……
t_en: I don't know why, but I can't help but feel resentful.

t_ch: 就决定是你了，迷迷。
t_en: Mem, I choose you!

t_ch: 你怎么跟使唤宠物似的？人家要生气了！
t_en: Why are you treating me like a pet! Mem's gonna get angry!

t_ch: 帮帮我，超级迷迷！
t_en: Help me, Super Mem!

t_ch: 呜啊，真的很不想理你。
t_en: Ugh, I really want to ignore you.

t_ch: 具体的事情我都听见了，看在你诚心诚意的份上，人家就大发慈悲地帮你看看吧。
t_en: I've heard most of the details. Since you asked me with such sincerity, I shall help you mercifully.

t_ch: 迷迷神情严肃，目光渗透向过去。不过，从你的视角看，它就只是在飘浮而已。
t_en: Mem has a serious expression, with a gaze that seems to penetrate into the past. But, from your perspective, it looks like it's just floating about.

t_ch: 呼，好难过的表情，她手里的那个是？日记？
t_en: Phew, what a sad expression. What's in her hand? A diary?

t_ch: 需要看看里面写了什么吗？
t_en: Do I need to take a look at what's written inside?

t_ch: 看，狠狠地看。
t_en: Yes, take a good look.

t_ch: 记住，这可不是人家要干的，都是你逼迫人家的哦。
t_en: Remember, doing this is not of Mem's own will, but by you forcing Mem's hands.

t_ch: 还是别了吧。
t_en: Let's not then.

t_ch: 啊…她自己把日记打开了。
t_en: Ah... She's opening the diary on her own.

t_ch: 呃，好乱的字迹，「又一个声音消失了，我还记得…帕西提亚，你是最该死的骗子，是你杜撰了神谕，所有人皆因你而死。」
t_en: Ugh, what messy handwriting. "Yet another voice disappeared, and I still remember... Pasithea, you're the most despicable liar. It's you who fabricated the prophecy, and everyone perished because of you."

t_ch: 这里的字都快绕成一圈了，头好晕……
t_en: The writing on this page is practically swirling in circles. I'm so dizzy...

t_ch: 「一切都是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}对我的惩罚——我背叛了它，罪有应得。」
t_en: "Everything that's happening is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} punishment for me — I betrayed them, and I deserved this."

t_ch: 「伟大的永夜之帷，这双盲眼已无法再窥见您的……」
t_en: "Veil of Evernight, these blind eyes can no longer get a glimpse of your..."

t_ch: …她下笔好重，纸都被戳穿了。
t_en: ...She's writing with such force that she's almost piercing through the paper.

t_ch: 「我放弃了…命运，自始至终，我都没能挣脱它的枷锁。如果说，还有什么方法能从中逃离，我能想到的只有——」
t_en: "I've given up... I've never been able to break free from the shackles of fate since the beginning. If there's a way to break free of it, I can only think of one..."

t_ch: 糟了！出大事了！
t_en: Oh shoot! Something huge is happening!

t_ch: 她写了什么？
t_en: What did she write?

t_ch: 「死亡！我将回归塞纳托斯的怀抱！」得赶快找到她！
t_en: "Death! I will return to the embrace of Thanatos!" We have to find her quickly!

t_ch: 赶上了！你上气不接下气地跑到帕西提亚面前，此时此刻，空白的大脑里只有一句话。
t_en: You made it! Panting heavily, you stop in front of Pasithea, with only one thought echoing in your blank mind.

t_ch: 咳咳咳，我先喘喘。
t_en: *coughs* Let me catch my breath.

t_ch: 别急，这位朋友。我又不是墨涅塔的蝴蝶，不会在你面前飞走的。在你重新开口之前，让我猜猜你的身份……
t_en: Don't rush, my friend. I'm not Mnestia's butterfly. I will not flit away before your eyes. Before you start, let me guess your identity...

t_ch: 几日前，在奥赫玛闹得沸沸扬扬的，黄金裔们的贵客，对吧？
t_en: You're the honored guest of the Chrysos Heirs who was causing such a commotion at Okhema just a few days back, right?

t_ch: 大师，算得真准。
t_en: Your foresight is amazing.

t_ch: 咕，暴露了。
t_en: Ugh, I've been exposed.

t_ch: 不对，我是缇宝。
t_en: Nope, I am Tribbie.

t_ch: 是吗？但这位缇宝大人，声音似乎有些成熟。
t_en: Oh really? But your voice seems quite mature for Lady Tribbie.

t_ch: 我记得城里的每一个声音，自然，也能辨识出新的声音。
t_en: I remember every voice in this city. Naturally, I can differentiate from the new voices.

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
t_en: We meet again, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我自以为，靠着梦里的谕示，不会有任何人找到这里，可还是漏掉了命运之外的访客。
t_en: I've always thought that no one will find this place due to the guidance from my dream's prophecy, but it seems like it overlooked the visitor beyond destiny.

t_ch: 好险！开拓者啊开拓者，差点就忘了你肩负的重要使命？你的大脑以超负荷的状态高速思考，怎样才能阻止她在你面前跳下去。
t_en: That was a close one! Trailblazer, oh Trailblazer, have you forgotten the important mission you carry? Your brain runs at full capacity, thinking of ways to stop her from jumping down.

t_ch: 生活还是很美好的。
t_en: Life is still pretty good.

t_ch: 是啊，即使永夜覆盖了我的眼睛，我也仍能在这里听见它的呓语，远方的欧洛尼斯。
t_en: Yes. Even if the Evernight covers my eyes, I still can hear the murmurs of distant Oronyx from here.

t_ch: 今天天气真不错呀。
t_en: The weather today is great.

t_ch: 如您所言，虽然无从窥见刻法勒背负的黎明机器，光芒洒落在身上的暖意也令人喜悦。
t_en: As you said, although I am unable to get a glimpse of the Dawn Device that Kephale is carrying, the warmth of its light still brings me joy.

t_ch: 我晚上睡觉会踢被子！
t_en: When I sleep at night, I kick away my blanket!

t_ch: 是吗？这可不是什么好习惯，愿欧洛尼斯降下赐福，让您得享安眠。
t_en: Really? This is not a good habit. May Oronyx bestow their blessings upon you, and bless you with blissful sleep.

t_ch: 帕西提亚的脸上带着一丝平和的微笑，但你知道，这正是麻木的象征。
t_en: Pasithea wears a serene smile on her face, but you know it's just a sign of numbness.

t_ch: 千万别想不开啊！
t_en: Please, don't do anything rash!

t_ch: 别死我任务里！
t_en: Please don't die in my mission!

t_ch: 投胎有风险，重开需谨慎。
t_en: Reincarnation comes with risks. Please consider carefully before resetting.

t_ch: 嗯？我只是来这里散心的呀——难道？听你急匆匆的声音，你是因为这个原因才过来的？
t_en: Huh? I was just taking a stroll... Unless? Judging by your urgent tone, you're here because of this?

t_ch: 不过，我应该没做什么让人误会的事才对。
t_en: But I don't think I've done anything for anyone to misunderstand.

t_ch: 有人说你是骗子。
t_en: Someone said you're a liar.

t_ch: 谢谢你的关心，但这和你的结论似乎没有关系呢。
t_en: Thank you for your concern, but this doesn't seem to be related to the conclusion you've drawn.

t_ch: 听说你梦见了幽灵。
t_en: I heard you dreamed of ghosts.

t_ch: 谢谢你的关心，但这和你的结论似乎没有关系呢。
t_en: Thank you for your concern, but this doesn't seem to be related to the conclusion you've drawn.

t_ch: （如实交代）
t_en: (Tell the truth)

t_ch: 你把一路的见闻，以及伙同迷迷偷看日记的罪行告知了帕西提亚。只是，她的反应似乎和预期的完全相反。
t_en: You tell Pasithea everything you've seen along the way, including collaborating with Mem to sneak a glance at the diary. Only, her reaction is entirely different from what you expected.

t_ch: …你、你是说，那位迷迷能接触到过去的记忆？！
t_en: ...Y—You're saying that Mem can access my memories!?

t_ch: 呼——抱歉，容我冷静一下……
t_en: Hoo... Sorry, allow me to collect myself...

t_ch: 日记里的事，我一时没法解释清楚。但我希望你和那位叫做迷迷的朋友，能帮我找一个「人」。
t_en: The situation with the diary... I can't really explain clearly now. But I hope you can call upon that friend you call Mem to help me find someone.

t_ch: 那个幽灵——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
t_en: That spirit... That {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin.

t_ch: 那个幽灵？
t_en: That ghost?

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的眷属？
t_en: Oronyx's kin?

t_ch: 什么玩意儿？
t_en: What's this?

t_ch: 沉睡的欧洛尼斯时常会将命运藏在呓语中，它们穿过天帷，成为常人无法捕捉的声音。我能听到它的梦呓，并从中解读出谕示。
t_en: The slumbering Oronyx often conceals fate within their murmurs. The murmurs traverse the celestial veil and become sounds beyond the reach of ordinary people. I can hear their murmurs and glean prophecies from them.

t_ch: 可这么多年以来，我的梦里一直掺杂着另一种杂音。
t_en: Yet, for many years, my dreams have always been plagued with another noise.

t_ch: 虽然它们非常模糊，可有两个词却比任何话语都要清晰。
t_en: Although it's very muffled, two words are clearer than anything else.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「帕西提亚」</color>、<color=#dbc291ff>「骗子」</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Pasithea</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>liar</color>.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯，它是否对我的背叛感到愤怒，才降下这样的惩罚？可既然如此，为何又要派遣眷属，指引众人把我从废墟里救出来？
t_en: Oronyx... are they angry over my betrayal, hence them meting such punishment? If that's the case, why did they send their kin to guide others to save me from the ruins?

t_ch: 命运到底是什么？这问题就像一把刀，割下我的眼睛，把它们留在废墟。我能在梦中听到未来，但双眼却只能看到过去。
t_en: What is destiny? This question feels like a knife, gouging out my eyes and leaving them at the ruins. I can hear the whispers of the future in my dreams, yet my eyes can only gaze into the past.

t_ch: 圣城的大家都很照顾我，但他们的搜寻全都无功而返。可如果是你的话——欧洛尼斯的赐福或许会指引你找到它。
t_en: Everyone in the holy city takes care of me, yet their searches yield nothing. If it's you — perhaps Oronyx's blessing will lead you to it.

t_ch: 就是这么牛。
t_en: I am that OP.

t_ch: 还是多亏了迷迷。
t_en: It's all thanks to Mem.

t_ch: 我们就是无敌的二人组。
t_en: We are the Invincible Duo.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的梦呓不只记录了未来的命运，也容纳着过去的记忆。
t_en: Oronyx's dream murmurs not only hold the fate of the future, but also memories of the past.

t_ch: 只要你们能把遗留在命运重渊的天外之音带给我，我就能从中找到它的踪迹，从它的口中得到答案。
t_en: As long as you can bring me the echoes from beyond the veil left behind at the Abyss of Fate, I will be able to find traces of the Titan's whereabouts and hear the truth from their mouth.

t_ch: 你真认为我们能找到新的圣女吗？
t_en: Do you really think we can find the new Holy Maiden?

t_ch: 自雅努斯陨落以来，命运泰坦们就一直以沉默应对祈求，我很难不认为，这正是它们对杀死血亲的人类的惩罚。
t_en: Since the fall of Janus, the Fate Titans have persistently answered our prayers with silence. This makes it hard for me not to believe that it's their punishment for humans who take the lives of their own kin.

t_ch: 神谕是必要的，一旦我们失去神谕，雅努萨波利斯在同盟中的地位将荡然无存。
t_en: Prophecies are necessary. Once we lose the prophecies, Janusopolis' position in the alliance will be obliterated.

t_ch: 到时候，我们就是黑潮里的一根稻草，只能任凭尼卡多利的军团把我们当作战利品放到盾牌和枪上。
t_en: By then, we'll just be a blade of grass among the black tide, merely a trophy for Nikador's legion to mount on their shields and spears.

t_ch: 再不济…我们还可以把那个女孩推上去。
t_en: If worse comes to worst... We can prop that girl up.

t_ch: 就像一直以来那样？
t_en: Like we always do?

t_ch: 同盟需要的只是神谕，而非真实的神谕，所有人都对这件事心知肚明。
t_en: What the alliance needs is just prophecies, not real prophecies. Everyone is well aware of that.

t_ch: 只要把圣女牢牢地掌控在手里，像笼子里的小鸟，命运泰坦究竟谕示了什么，还不都归我们来解释？
t_en: As long as we have the Holy Maiden in the palm of our hand like a bird in a cage, whatever the Fate Titans have truly foretold is left for us to interpret, isn't it?

t_ch: 可我担心，万一她也逃了怎么办？又或者，情急之下，逃进{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的手下……
t_en: But my concern is... what if she also escapes? Then what? Or, in a moment of desperation, she escapes into the hands of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 你不说，我不说，谁又能知道，在神殿深处宣告神谕的圣女，和以前的是不是同一个人？
t_en: If you and I both keep quiet, who will know whether the Holy Maiden living at the depths of the temple is the same person as before?

t_ch: 闭上眼，将你的心灵放至永夜天帷之上，在星夜之间，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，岁月与命运的车轮，它们正碾过你那纯粹的灵魂。
t_en: Close your eyes and cast your soul into the Evernight Veil. Among the starry night, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, the wheel of time and destiny, shall grind your pure soul.

t_ch: 阿伯，如果车轮从我的身上碾过去，那我是不是会碎掉？就像爸爸那样？
t_en: Uncle, if the wheel rolls over me, will I break? Just like my father?

t_ch: 碎掉的话，我就会去{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}那里，是不是就没法去见欧洛尼斯了？
t_en: If I break, I will go to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. Does that mean I'll never be able to see Oronyx?

t_ch: 这只是颂词，你安静些，照我说的去做。
t_en: It's just a chant. Be quiet and do as I say.

t_ch: 好吧——阿伯，我有些怕疼，你能不能让欧洛尼斯它们快一些？我害怕。
t_en: Okay... Uncle, I'm afraid of pain. Can you get Oronyx to be faster? I'm afraid.

t_ch: 少女枯瘦的身体，在辅祭的注视下瑟瑟发抖。她本想再说些什么，她还是担心欧洛尼斯会不小心撞碎自己。
t_en: The girl's waifish body quivers beneath the acolyte's gaze. She thinks of saying something, but she is still worried Oronyx might accidentally break her.

t_ch: 肚子因饥饿而发出声响，迅速打断了亵渎的思绪。
t_en: A growl escapes her hungry stomach, swiftly cutting off the blasphemous thoughts.

t_ch: 对…不起。
t_en: So... rry.

t_ch: 现在，把祭祀的草药取出来，不要把手放进嘴里！会中毒的。
t_en: Now, take out the ceremonial herbs, and don't put your hands in your mouth! You'll get poisoned.

t_ch: 还记得我之前教你的吗？三相祭祀的下一步是什么？
t_en: Do you still remember what I taught you? What's the next step to the tripartite ritual?

t_ch: 念诵万径之门…塔兰顿的赞词！
t_en: Recite the Gate of Infinity... Talanton's praise!

t_ch: 胡闹！那是雅努斯！
t_en: Nonsense! That's Janus!

t_ch: 就在不久以前，我还见过您的丈夫，那位总能凯旋的将士。可现在，贫穷竟也要沿着扎格列斯的讥笑笼罩住一个英雄的家庭。
t_en: Just a while ago, I met your husband, the warrior who always returned victorious. But now, even poverty shrouds a hero's family alongside Zagreus' mockery.

t_ch: 父母失去生命，被迫在战争中坠入冥河，孩童失去亲人，在饥饿和病痛里陷入永眠。
t_en: Parents lose their lives, driven into the River of Souls by the ravages of war, while children are left bereft of family, entering eternal sleep amidst hunger and sickness.

t_ch: 放任黑潮蔓延，我等却无能为力，一切都是我们这些当权者的责任。
t_en: We are powerless in stopping the spread of the black tide. This failure lies with us — the ones in power.

t_ch: 如果她成为了圣女，我，还能再见到她吗？
t_en: If she becomes the Holy Maiden, can I still see her?

t_ch: 来自世俗的尘埃会玷污圣女的纯洁。臭名昭著的先代圣女，正是因母亲的蛊惑，盗走了雅努斯的火种，才让雅努萨波利斯沦落至此。
t_en: The dust of the secular world will taint the Holy Maiden's purity. The infamy that stained the previous Holy Maiden was thanks to her mother, who deluded her into stealing away Janus' Coreflame. That led to the present downfall of Janusopolis.

t_ch: 那如果，她没能成功呢？我是说，帕西提亚只是个随处可见普通的孩子，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的目光怎么会垂怜这样一个女孩呢？
t_en: What if she doesn't succeed? What I'm saying is, Pasithea is just a normal child you can pick off the street. Why would the gaze of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} land on such a girl?

t_ch: 夫人，您还能养育她多久呢？黑潮正在吞没磐岩之脊的大地，麦田被侵蚀，土壤被淹没，您要怎样抵抗这场饥荒？
t_en: Madam, how long can you keep raising her? The black tide swallows the lands of the Pillar of Stone as we speak. Wheat fields are corroded, and the soil is flooded. How will you withstand this famine?

t_ch: 要不了多久，你们都会饿死在这里。
t_en: It won't be long till you all starve to death here.

t_ch: 祭司的声音突然高了几度，就连正在为祭祀动作而慌乱的帕西提亚，都不禁回过头来。
t_en: The priest suddenly raises his voice. Even Pasithea, who has been fretting over the ritual, can't help turning her head.

t_ch: 别分心，帕西提亚，继续跟着辅祭大人的指示做。
t_en: Don't get distracted, Pasithea. Keep following the instructions of the acolyte.

t_ch: 现在，你们有改变命运的机会。她会成为衣食无忧的圣女，作为补偿，我们也会给身为母亲的你足够的粮食，挺过这场饥荒。
t_en: Now, you have the chance to change destiny. She will become a Holy Maiden who does not need to worry about food and shelter. As compensation, we will offer you, her mother, enough food to tide through this famine.

t_ch: 你不要不识好歹。
t_en: Do what is good for you.

t_ch: 还是一无所获？你这个圣女到底是干什么吃的？
t_en: Still nothing? What exactly are you good for as a Holy Maiden?

t_ch: 可是，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: But {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 我知道它在沉默，可你以为我们为什么要把你给带过来？神谕，神谕！没有欧洛尼斯的神谕，你就什么都不是！
t_en: I know they're staying silent, but why do you think we brought you here? Prophecy! Prophecy! Without Oronyx's prophecy, you're nothing!

t_ch: 真不知道你那天到底是撞了什么大运，竟然真的得到了它的谕示。
t_en: I honestly don't know what fortune you stumbled onto that day to be able to receive their prophecy.

t_ch: 我现在简直怀疑，这全都是扎格列斯的把戏，让一个废物挂上圣女的名声，然后来愚弄我们。
t_en: I'm now thoroughly suspecting that it's all a trick by Zagreus — for the Holy Maiden's title to be adorned on trash like you and make a mockery of us.

t_ch: 你，还有那个老女人，都不过是玩弄诡计的骗子！
t_en: You, and that old woman, are nothing but scheming liars!

t_ch: 少女的牙齿紧紧贴合，摩擦出铁锈味。这番话语，无疑是对她和母亲莫大的羞辱。
t_en: The girl's jaws are tightly clenched, tasting iron through gritted teeth. Such words are nothing less than sheer insults to her and her mother.

t_ch: 反正，无论如何，你们都会用自己需要的说法去糊弄别人。既然如此，我这个圣女还有什么用呢？
t_en: No matter what, you will all say what you need to in order to mislead others. If that's the case, what use am I as the Holy Maiden?

t_ch: 真假预言的区别，刁民看不出来，我们还不知道吗？不受控的神谕只会招致灾难，重蹈黄金战争的覆辙。
t_en: You think we don't know that the commonfolk can't tell the difference between true and false prophecies? Wild prophecies will only invite catastrophe, repeating the mistakes of the Chrysos War.

t_ch: 我知道，你一直觉得我们都是群骗子，用神谕来控制神殿外的蠢货。
t_en: I know that you've always thought us a bunch of liars, using prophecies to control the fools outside the temple.

t_ch: 可我要告诉你，真正需要神谕的，不是我们，恰恰是他们！
t_en: But let me tell you: The ones who truly need prophecies are not us, but them!

t_ch: 如果我现在告诉他们，神谕根本就不存在。他们还有在黑潮里活下去的希望吗？呵，他们会冲上来，把我们全都撕成碎片，然后绝望地等待{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: If I told them now that the prophecies don't exist, would they even have any hope of surviving the black tide? Hah, they would barge in and tear us to shreds, and wait for {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} in despair.

t_ch: 这该死的命运！为什么只为我们留下了这个无能的欧洛尼斯！
t_en: That damned destiny! Why did it only leave us with this worthless Oronyx!

t_ch: 不行，你们的要求太多了。再这样下去，迟早会被人揭穿。
t_en: That won't do. You're asking too much. We'll be exposed if we keep this up.

t_ch: 我知道，那些言辞放纵的诡辩家，越来越多的人开始倒戈向他们。就因为这原因，就要欧洛尼斯为你们「降下」一次神谕？
t_en: I know. The fervent ranks of those loose-tongued sophists swell by the day. So that's why you want Oronyx to "bestow" a prophecy upon you?

t_ch: 听说，尼卡多利的军团和你们的城邦只剩不到三天的距离，他们可不会相信来自命运的预言。
t_en: I hear that Nikador's legion is but fewer than three days away from your city. They won't buy any contrived prophecies of destiny.

t_ch: 哼，就在一年前，你们可还是另一幅嘴脸…我也懂，毕竟位置互换了。
t_en: Hmph, you were begging for our favor merely a year ago...But I get it. The tables have turned.

t_ch: 但既然你们要撕破脸，也别怪我把事情全都捅出去。
t_en: But since the gloves are off, don't blame me for spilling the entire truth.

t_ch: 我无权干涉你的个人行为，你也不是第一个这样做的。
t_en: I have no authority to interfere with your actions, and you're not the first to do so.

t_ch: 去告诉他们，那些财宝进了谁的口袋，绝不会为他们带来好运——去告诉他们，泰坦不会庇佑他们，黑潮会照常涌上大地——
t_en: Go tell them whose pockets those riches now line and how the offerings will never bring them fortune... Go tell them the Titans won't protect them and the black tide will inevitably surge across the lands...

t_ch: 即使欧洛尼斯沉默不语，我也能替你预言——他们会杀了你，他们不会相信。
t_en: Even if Oronyx remains silent, I can foretell your future after you tell the people these truths — the citizens will kill you. They will not believe it.

t_ch: 等着瞧吧，总有一天，公正之秤的惩戒会平等地落到我们每个人头上。
t_en: We'll see. One day, the Scale of Justice will exact equal retribution unto each and every one of us.

t_ch: 我也希望如此……可是，塔兰顿已经不在了。
t_en: I hope so too... But Talanton is gone.

t_ch: 辅祭疲惫地望向远方，发出叹息。仿佛他曾笃信的，深爱的，也早已跟着神殿所供奉的泰坦们一同死去。
t_en: The acolyte lethargically stares into the distance and sighs. As if what he once believed and deeply loved, had long since perished alongside the Titans that the temple once worshiped.

t_ch: 如果命运泰坦们真能窥见未来，那它们是否看到了黑潮吞没一切的景象？为什么不来拯救我们？
t_en: If the Fate Titans could really peer into the future, would they have seen the black tide devour everything? Why do they not come and save us?

t_ch: 为何，它们不拒绝献出火种的命运？还是说，它们在命运面前也无能为力？
t_en: Why do they not refuse the destiny that forces them to offer up the Coreflame? Or are they also powerless before destiny itself?

t_ch: 诸位，恐惧的黑潮正在吞噬大地，疯王的长矛随时可能指向任何一座城邦。
t_en: Everyone, the terrifying black tide is devouring the lands, and the Mad King's lance will be pointed at any city at any time.

t_ch: 就在这之外，厄运的影子也试图把我们拖向灭亡！
t_en: Even right here, the shadow of misfortune attempts to drag us towards annihilation!

t_ch: 听听它对你们说了什么？它说，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}拒绝降下神谕，泰坦从未爱着它的子民。
t_en: Listen to what it has said to you. It said that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to bestow a prophecy, and that the Titans never loved their subjects.

t_ch: 你们会中了它的诡计吗？
t_en: Would you have succumbed to its trickery?

t_ch: 抓住它！鞭打它！该死的骗子！扎格列斯的走狗！
t_en: Capture it! Flagellate it! Damnable liar! Lapdog of Zagreus!

t_ch: 祭司大人，愿欧洛尼斯不会责罚那些被诡计欺骗的好人！
t_en: O priest, may Oronyx not castigate those kind souls deceived by trickery!

t_ch: …自然，命运会庇佑我们。
t_en: ...Naturally, destiny will protect us.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的神谕已经降下，出自泰坦之语，不可曲解，不可动摇的命运。我们终会战胜死亡和纷争，众神的目光将照耀我们荣耀的前路！
t_en: Oronyx's prophecy has been bestowed. They are the words of the Titans. They form untwistable and unwavering destiny. We will eventually triumph over death and strife. May the gods' gazes shine radiant over our glorious advance!

t_ch: 大家听到了吗？命运！伟大的命运会庇佑我们！
t_en: Does everyone hear clear? Destiny! Grand destiny will protect us!

t_ch: 赞美欧洛尼斯！赞美欧洛尼斯！
t_en: Praise Oronyx! Praise Oronyx!

t_ch: 我再确认一次——「黑潮将吞没雅努萨波利斯」，神谕真是这样说的？
t_en: Allow me to ascertain once again: "The black tide will devour Janusopolis" — did the prophecy really state this?

t_ch: 沉默了这么多年，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}就这样回应我们？
t_en: After being silent for so many years, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} responded to us just like that?

t_ch: 这就是我们深信不疑的命运？难道，我们就要眼睁睁地看着这座城邦被献祭给野蛮的尼卡多利？
t_en: This is the destiny in which we so devoutly believe? Are we supposed to watch helplessly as this city is offered to the savage Nikador?

t_ch: 让帕西提亚再做一次三相祈祷！给泰坦献上最好的祭品。或许，欧洛尼斯会回心转意？然后改写我们的命运。
t_en: Have Pasithea plead with the Three Fates once more! Proffer the most luxurious of sacrifice to the Titan. Mayhaps Oronyx will change their mind? Then they will rewrite our fate.

t_ch: 没错，现在的它只是被愤怒冲昏了头脑，故意吓吓我们这些凡人而已——你别闷着啊！
t_en: That's right. The way they are now, they're just feverish with rage. It's nothing more than one of their tantrums to frighten us mortals... Well, say something!

t_ch: 如果我告诉你，黑潮会杀死我们所有人，所有人都会死。你会相信吗？
t_en: If I told you that the black tide will kill us all, and everyone will die, will you believe me?

t_ch: 当然不信！和灾厄泰坦打了这么多年，每天都要想方设法地去骗那些刁民，好让他们带着所谓的荣誉活下去。
t_en: Of course not! After fighting the Calamity Titans for so many years, having to lie to those boorish commonfolk every day with a new tale... At least let them live on with their supposed honor.

t_ch: 现在你说，我们做的一切全都是徒劳？
t_en: Now you're telling me that everything we did was for naught?

t_ch: 如果我现在告诉你，黑潮不会降临，我们都能活下去。你会相信吗？
t_en: If I told you now that the black tide will not breach us, that we will all live, will you believe me then?

t_ch: 我们只是不愿承认而已。那么多城邦覆灭在了「岁月」里，现在轮到我们了。
t_en: We simply do not wish to admit it ourselves. So many cities have been decimated by "time." Now it is our turn.

t_ch: 那神谕…要怎么……
t_en: Then that prophecy... How do we...

t_ch: 和往常一样就好。
t_en: Just do what you usually do.

t_ch: 对了，别急着走，还是照你说的那样，让帕西提亚再试试…命运，希望会有转机。
t_en: Oh yes, don't be in a hurry to leave. We'll still attempt what you said, to have Pasithea try again... in hopes of destiny turning in our favor.

t_ch: 最近外面是越来越不安生了，神殿外的声音日渐稀疏，送来的祭品也是一天比一天少。
t_en: It's getting more unsafe outside these days. The sounds outside the temple have been waning, and our offerings dwindle by the day.

t_ch: 这些祭祀用的草药，有好多都已经枯死了——是从黑潮里带出来吗？
t_en: Most of these ritual herbs have withered and died. Were they brought from within the black tide?

t_ch: 是的，大人。据说，为了从「黑潮诞生的怪物」手下逃掉，还折了不少人，就连尸体也没能带回来。
t_en: Yes, Your Highness. It is said that we lost many a good man trying to flee the monsters spawned of the black tide — we couldn't even bring their bodies back home.

t_ch: 可这又有什么法子？为了养家糊口，他们就指望着神殿给的那点报酬呢。
t_en: But what other solutions do they have? All they have are the hopes of the temple's meager rewards to feed their families.

t_ch: 那些死难者的家属，你都记下来，报酬按双倍来算。这是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}恩赐给他们的。至于多出来的部分，都算在我的头上。
t_en: The relatives of the dead... note them down, and double their remunerations. This is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} blessing unto them. I will pay for the portion that exceeds the allotted compensation.

t_ch: 顺便告诉他们，未来的一段时间里，神殿都不需要祭品和草药了。这里没有更多的报酬给他们，要想活命的话，就去圣城奥赫玛吧。
t_en: Also tell them, in the near future, the temple will have no need of tribute or herbs. We have little else to reward them with. If they wish to live, tell them to go to the holy city of Okhema.

t_ch: 大人，难道说？
t_en: My lord, you mean...?

t_ch: 该说的，我都说了。有些不该说的，我想你清楚该怎么解释。
t_en: I've already said what has to be said. As for the things I didn't say, I'm sure you know how to explain them to the commoners.

t_ch: 我明白了。这绝非神谕所启示的毁灭，仅仅是我们这些卑劣的家伙，不满于侍奉命运泰坦的清贫，所以才被扎格列斯蛊惑，逃向奥赫玛而已。
t_en: Understood. This is absolutely not the destruction preordained by prophecy. Some of us are simply unhappy with the poverty that comes with worshiping the Fate Titans, so we were deceived by Zagreus and fled to Okhema.

t_ch: 很好，把草药送到圣女那里吧，向欧洛尼斯的祭祀马上就要开始了。
t_en: Very good. Send the herbs to the Holy Maiden. The ritual to Oronyx is about to start.

t_ch: 在离开前，恕我冒昧地问一句——我们真的没法逃脱这命运吗？我们可以说服那些固执的祭司，向奥赫玛请求支援。
t_en: Before I leave, forgive me for asking — can we truly not escape this fate? We can persuade those stubborn priests to plead for aid from Okhema.

t_ch: 如果雅努萨波利斯注定要沦陷，求援也不过是让更多人在这里送命而已。
t_en: If Janusopolis is destined to fall, reinforcements will only cause more people to forsake their lives here.

t_ch: …大人，愿众神的目光照耀我们荣耀的前路。
t_en: ...My lord, may the gods' gazes shine radiant on our glorious advance.

t_ch: 你感到一阵眩晕，仿佛帕西提亚的情绪，正穿透时间和记忆，刺进你的大脑。
t_en: You feel a wave of dizziness, as if Pasithea's emotions are penetrating time and memory and going right into your mind.

t_ch: 我试过了，我真的什么都试过了，但根本就没有意义，什么都不会改变。黑潮，黑潮，我还是能看见它朝着我们涌来。
t_en: I've tried everything. I really have, but it's no use. Nothing will change. Black tide. The black tide. I still see it surging towards us.

t_ch: 命运为什么总是这样！{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，你就这么恨我吗？！
t_en: Why does destiny toy with us so! {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, do you hate me that much!?

t_ch: 呕吐感，悬浮感，你的意识因连续的冲击而开始飘忽。
t_en: Nausea. Vertigo. Your senses start to drift and muddle from successive shocks.

t_ch: 未来根本就不存在，只能看到一片漆黑的世界，废墟，死亡，疯狂的泰坦和已死的泰坦。
t_en: The future doesn't even exist. All I can see is a pitch-black world. Ruin, death, the maddened Titan, and other dead Titans.

t_ch: 如果我什么都改变不了，为什么要让我看到这些？难道只是想要让更多的人和你一同沉沦在绝望里吗？
t_en: If I can't change anything, why do you let me see these? Do you want even more people to wallow in despair like you?

t_ch: 可为什么是我？我什么都没有做，我只想，我只想……
t_en: But why me? I haven't done anything. I just, I just want...

t_ch: 有谁在你的耳边说话，「危险」、「停下来」…是迷迷吗？你想要辨别，但一股无法抵抗的力量正在诱惑你闭上双眼。
t_en: Someone is whispering in your ear. "Danger," "Stop" ...Is it Mem? You try to discern the voice, but an irresistible force is enticing you to close your eyes.

t_ch: 这世上存在一些记忆，它们过于混乱，甚至能反作用于窥探者的意识。不过，你的忆者朋友们还没来得及教会你这一点。
t_en: Some memories in this world are so chaotic that they can reversely devour the observer's consciousness. Unfortunately, your Memokeeper friends haven't yet taught you that fact.

t_ch: 无能为力，自身难保，恐惧与疲惫接踵而来。只要闭上眼，让灵魂沉入永夜，便再也不用为之苦恼。
t_en: Helpless and unprotected, fear and fatigue assault you. As long as you close your eyes and let your soul sink into the ever-night, then all these woes will fade away.

t_ch: 帕西提亚，睁开眼睛，在欧洛尼斯的谕示里，你看到了什么？
t_en: Pasithea, open your eyes. What did you see in Oronyx's prophecy?

t_ch: 无法逃离的死亡。
t_en: Inescapable death.

t_ch: 永恒沉寂的黑潮。
t_en: The eternally silent black tide.

t_ch: 腐败衰亡的世界。
t_en: A corrupted and ailing world.

t_ch: 可这不该是你的结局，命运如此不公地对待你，难道你不觉得它欠你一个未来吗？
t_en: But this should not be your end. Destiny will not treat you so unfairly. Do you not think it owes you a future?

t_ch: 如果当时没能成为圣女，一切会变得不同吗？没有约束，自由自在，像一只鸟儿。
t_en: If you did not become the Holy Maiden then, would everything have turned out differently? Unfettered, free among the free, like a bird.

t_ch: 我可能会成为工匠。
t_en: I might have become a craftsman.

t_ch: 工匠，那常常是山之民的工作。可谁说得准呢？也许你真能成为一个杰出的工匠。
t_en: Craftsmanship is common work for Mountain Dwellers. But who knows? You might turn out to be an excellent craftsman.

t_ch: 你锻造的武器会斩下怪物们的头颅，吟游诗人的歌谣里，永久传颂你的名姓。
t_en: The weapons you forge will behead monsters, and the ballads of bards will forever laud your name.

t_ch: 我可能会成为学者。
t_en: I might have become a scholar.

t_ch: 瑟希斯的信徒，又或者艾格勒赐福的子民，把你的智慧用于创造、记录和辨析。
t_en: Cerces' disciple, or perhaps a subject graced by Aquila. Using your wisdom to create, record, and decipher.

t_ch: 你斟酌的修辞会被无数后人引用，你的名字也会被树庭的学者们所牢记。
t_en: Your eloquent rhetoric will be quoted by countless others after you. Your name will also be remembered by scholars of the Grove.

t_ch: 我可能会成为战士。
t_en: I may have become a warrior.

t_ch: 荣耀的战士，就像你的父亲，手持长矛和黑潮里的怪物厮杀。甚至像那些黄金裔，剑指失去理智的泰坦。
t_en: A glorious warrior, just like your father, wielding lance in hand, locked in fierce battle against the black tide's spawn. Perhaps not unlike the Chrysos Heirs, brandishing blades against frantic Titans.

t_ch: 荣耀将伴你左右，而后，石板上将雕刻出你的英勇。
t_en: Glory will follow your path, and after that, your heroism will be etched in epitaphs.

t_ch: 但这一切都不可能发生，你就是帕西提亚，命运三相殿的圣女。一个没有尊严，没有自由的囚徒。
t_en: But all this will not come to pass. You are just Pasithea, the Holy Maiden of the Temple of the Three Fates. A prisoner without dignity or freedom.

t_ch: 现在回答我，帕西提亚，在欧洛尼斯的谕示里，你看到了什么？
t_en: Now, answer me, Pasithea — what did you see in Oronyx's prophecy?

t_ch: 你看到黑潮吞没了大地，塞纳托斯引领的死亡带来枯萎和朽烂。
t_en: You see the black tide swallowing the land. The death led by Thanatos brings decay and rot.

t_ch: 它是多么公平，艾格勒的信徒，瑟希斯的信徒，还有欧洛尼斯的信徒。所有人都平等地在死亡中迎来永眠。
t_en: It is truly fair. Aquila's disciples, Cerces' disciples and Oronyx's disciples — all are equally facing eternal slumber in death.

t_ch: 无论你逃到哪里，命运无处不在，它永远会跟在你的身后，就像过去的每一次那样。只剩下黑暗与死亡，死亡与黑暗，黑暗与死亡……
t_en: No matter where you escape, destiny is omnipresent. It will always follow in your shadow, just like every time it did in the past. There's only darkness and death, death and darkness, darkness and death...

t_ch: 你还能逃去哪儿呢？除非将你的灵魂献给塞纳托斯…没错，塞纳托斯！祭祀！
t_en: Where else can you escape? Unless you offer up your soul to Thanatos... That's right, Thanatos! A sacrifice!

t_ch: 吞下那些剧毒的草药！
t_en: Swallow those poisonous herbs!

t_ch: 然后，黑潮如期而至。
t_en: And then, the black tide arrived.

t_ch: 你在熟悉的地方醒来，还记得发生了什么吗？为了从命运中逃离，帕西提亚，你背叛了欧洛尼斯，咽下毒药，转而投向塞纳托斯的怀抱。
t_en: You awaken in a familiar place. Do you still remember what happened? To escape destiny, Pasithea, you betrayed Oronyx, imbibed poison, and turned yourself into Thanatos' embrace.

t_ch: 可是，就连死亡也不愿接收你悲哀的魂灵。
t_en: But even death did not deign possession of your tragic soul.

t_ch: 上前去吧，天平已明晰你灵魂的重量，只待被赋予与之相称的命运。
t_en: Go forth. The scale has ascertained the weight of your soul. Only a fate worthy of it waits.

t_ch: 上前去吧，天平已高悬在你的头顶，用它明晰你灵魂的重量。
t_en: Go forth. The scale has risen far above your head. Use it to ascertain the weight of your soul.

t_ch: 然后，取得与之相称的命运。
t_en: And then, attain the destiny of equal worth.

t_ch: 睁大眼睛看看，帕西提亚，你的丑态。
t_en: Open your eyes and look, Pasithea. Look at your miserable visage.

t_ch: 毒药没能要了你的命，却夺走了你的眼睛。当然，这足够了，你无法再完成圣女的祈祷，只能被祭司们关在这里，然后被埋进废墟。
t_en: The poison did not take your life, but robbed you of your eyes. Of course, that much is sufficient. You are no longer able to complete the Holy Maiden's prayer. You can only be locked away by the priests here, and then buried in debris.

t_ch: 他们为何不放你自生自灭？因为仅剩的一点点良心。不过这也不重要，他们大概全都死在了黑潮里。
t_en: Why do they not leave you to your devices? Because they have a mere tinge of conscience left in them. But that is not important, for they are probably all dead in the black tide's deluge.

t_ch: 久违地，你感受到饥饿。你还记得离开时，母亲对你说的最后一句话，她努力挤出笑容，只要稍微松动嘴角，眼泪就会沿着皱纹流下。
t_en: After a long time, you feel famished, a sensation you have not felt for a long time. You still remember the last words your mother said to you when you left her. She tried her hardest to force a smile — as soon as the corners of her lips drooped, her tears would flow down her wrinkled crevices.

t_ch: 「开心点，帕西提亚，以后你就再也不必挨饿了。」
t_en: "Cheer up, Pasithea. You won't ever have to go hungry again."

t_ch: 她现在在哪儿？
t_en: Where is she now?

t_ch: 她还活着吗？在这个万物走向寂灭的时代。你向被自己背叛的欧洛尼斯祈祷，愿命运庇佑她的前路。
t_en: Is she still alive? In this era where all life heads towards quietus, you pray to Oronyx whom you betrayed, in hopes that destiny will bless her journey.

t_ch: 我好想她。
t_en: I miss her dearly.

t_ch: 你早已忘记了她的模样，她的声音，即使她来到你的面前，呼唤你的名字，你也没法认出她。
t_en: You have long forgotten her face and her voice — even if she were to stand before you and call out your name, you would not recognize her.

t_ch: 我恨她。
t_en: I hate her.

t_ch: 她为了自己能活下来，把你「卖」给了那些祭司。你自此再也没能离开命运三相殿一步，也许从那时起，你就已经死了。
t_en: She sold you to these priests so that she could live. You were never able to step foot outside the Temple of the Three Fates after that day. Perhaps, from the moment that happened, you were already dead.

t_ch: 别再想这件事了，那个抛弃了你的女人。即使你有一万个理由替她辩解，饥饿和恐惧仍让你不由自主地去憎恨。
t_en: Stop thinking about that event and that woman who abandoned you. Even if you had a million reasons to speak up for her, hunger and fear will fuel your instinctive hate for her.

t_ch: 你甚至开始憎恨那位先代圣女，若不是她，你怎会沦落到这般境地？但你知道，这不过是迁怒。
t_en: You have even started to abhor that previous Holy Maiden — if not for her, would you even be in such a beleaguered predicament? But you know you are just venting your frustrations.

t_ch: 很快，你就要死在这里了。
t_en: Very soon, you will die here.

t_ch: 瞧瞧是谁来了？尊贵的圣女大人。
t_en: Who do we have here? Our esteemed Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 高高在上地指责我们是杜撰神谕的骗子，如此维护它，欧洛尼斯是如何对待你的？
t_en: Accusing us of being liars fabricating prophecies from your ivory tower, defending it with fervor. And how is Oronyx treating you?

t_ch: 我当然知道我们宣告的神谕是假的，可既然如此，它为什么不把真正的神谕给我们？眼睁睁地看着翁法罗斯走向灭亡？
t_en: I obviously know the prophecy we declared is false. But since that's the case, why doesn't the Titan give us the true prophecy? Do they wish to simply watch as Amphoreus is destroyed?

t_ch: 老朋友，没必要指责一个无知的小女孩。无论是她，还是我们，甚至是三位命运泰坦，都不过是这命运重渊的囚徒。
t_en: Old friend, no need to be so harsh on an ignorant girl. Be it her, us, or the Fate Titans, we are but all prisoners of this Abyss of Fate.

t_ch: 逃不掉的，终究是逃不掉。
t_en: No escape. It is inevitable.

t_ch: 我已经不想再反抗了。
t_en: I do not wish to resist any longer.

t_ch: 我一定会冲出囚笼。
t_en: I will burst forth from this cage.

t_ch: 我绝不认可这样的命运。
t_en: I will never accept such a fate.

t_ch: 走吧，帕西提亚，去见证你的命运，然后为它做出选择。
t_en: Go, Pasithea. Go witness your destiny, and make a choice for it.

t_ch: 年幼的你无法理解，在神谕之外，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}究竟是以何种方法向你揭示了那些命运。
t_en: Your young self would not understand what methods {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} employed to reveal those destinies to you beyond the prophecy.

t_ch: 自两位血亲死去以来，这或许是它最为慷慨的一次启示，悲惨的景色映入你的眼眸。
t_en: Ever since your two kin passed, this could be the Titan's most generous revelation as the tragic scene reflected in your eyes.

t_ch: 被关进神殿深处，咽下毒草，最后被掩埋在废墟里。方才经历的种种，只是你在恍惚间经历的一场有关未来的噩梦。
t_en: Locked in the depths of the temple, choking on poison herbs, finally buried beneath debris... What you have experienced is but a nightmare of the future you encountered in a stupor.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要你让谎言自口中流出，就能踏上通往另一条未来的道路，逃离这可悲的命运。</color>孩子，你会做出怎样的选择？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as you allow lies to flow from your lips, you will embark on a path toward another future, and escape this tragic destiny.</color> Child, what choice will you make?

t_ch: 向祭司说谎。
t_en: Lie to the priest.

t_ch: 诓骗他们，就说自己什么也没看见，欧洛尼斯从未向你揭示过任何事物。
t_en: Deceive them, claiming to have not seen anything, and that Oronyx never revealed anything to you.

t_ch: 装疯卖傻。
t_en: Feign madness and ignorance.

t_ch: 如同痴傻的疯子，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的狂信徒，谁会选择一个理智全无的家伙？
t_en: Like a foolish madman, a fanatic disciple of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. Who will choose an irrational person?

t_ch: 保持缄默。
t_en: Maintain silence.

t_ch: 就像欧洛尼斯那样，以沉默应对这些贪婪的祭司，如同被割下喉咙的鸟雀。
t_en: Just like Oronyx, reply these greedy priests with silence, like a bird with its throat slit.

t_ch: 你成功逃脱了圣女的囚笼。接下来，你打算做些什么？
t_en: You've successfully escaped the cage of being a Holy Maiden. What do you intend to do next?

t_ch: 去做个工匠。
t_en: Go be a craftsman.

t_ch: 去做个学者。
t_en: Go be a scholar.

t_ch: 去做个战士。
t_en: Go be a warrior.

t_ch: 你试图畅想这样不切实际的未来，事实上，你们很快就会因饥饿而死。
t_en: You try to imagine such an unrealistic future. But in reality, you all will soon die from hunger.

t_ch: 家里的食物已经见底了，母亲正竭力以挨饿的方式令你远离饥饿。你第一次注意到，她的身形已是那样枯槁。
t_en: The food in the house has already been depleted, and your mother is enduring hunger to protect you from it. This is the first time you notice that her figure has become so emaciated.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要成为圣女，你们都能活下来</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as you become the Holy Maiden, you all will survive</color>.

t_ch: 我们可以去田里耕种。
t_en: We can go into the fields and farm.

t_ch: 枯瘦的身体已无法支撑这样的劳动，日渐被黑潮吞没的土地，没有地方能供你们耕种。
t_en: Your weakened bodies can no longer withstand such labor. As the black tide slowly swallows the land, there will be no place for you to farm.

t_ch: 可如果成为圣女，你们都能活下来。
t_en: But if you become the Holy Maiden, you all will be able to survive.

t_ch: 我们可以去做工赚钱。
t_en: We can go and work for money.

t_ch: 纺织？或者雕刻？可哪儿来的工具和材料？现实可不是母亲读的睡前故事。
t_en: Weaving? Or carving? But where will the tools and materials come from? Reality is not a bedtime story read by your mother.

t_ch: 但只要成为圣女，你们都能活下来。
t_en: But if you become the Holy Maiden, you all will be able to survive.

t_ch: 我要成为圣女。
t_en: I want to become the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 这是你唯一的命运。
t_en: This is your only destiny.

t_ch: 我们可以逃去奥赫玛。
t_en: You all can escape to Okhema.

t_ch: 那座天上的圣城，就连站都站不稳的你们，要如何抵达？
t_en: You all can barely stand on your two feet. How will you reach the holy city that's high above?

t_ch: 放弃挣扎吧，帕西提亚。
t_en: Give up on struggling, Pasithea.

t_ch: 我还可以选择…
t_en: I still can make a choice...

t_ch: 毫无意义的反抗，你有勇气选择死亡吗？即使这是懦弱的行径？即便母亲也会因此失去生的希望？
t_en: A pointless defiance. Do you have the bravery to choose death? Even if this is an act of cowardice? Even if your mother will lose hope for life because of this?

t_ch: 放弃挣扎吧，帕西提亚。
t_en: Give up on struggling, Pasithea.

t_ch: 我将成为圣女。
t_en: I will become the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 这是不可更改的命运。
t_en: This destiny cannot be altered.

t_ch: 我不想失去自由！
t_en: I don't want to lose my freedom!

t_ch: 我不想变成骗子！
t_en: I don't want to become a liar!

t_ch: 我会成为圣女。
t_en: I will be the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 母亲不会责怪你，为了让你活下去，她多半会承担那些危险的工作，深入黑潮的活计。
t_en: Your mother will not blame you. To ensure your survival, she will likely take on dangerous jobs, doing work deep in the black tide.

t_ch: 在未来的某天，会有陌生的人敲响你的家门，带你去往她的葬礼。
t_en: Someday in the future, there will be strangers knocking on your door, bringing you to attend her funeral.

t_ch: 我害怕命中注定的未来。
t_en: I fear for my destined future.

t_ch: 我会成为圣女。
t_en: I will be the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 母亲，这世上唯一仍爱着你，你唯一爱着的人。她将所能给予的一切全都给了你，现在，连她的生命也要因你而消逝。
t_en: Your mother, the only one who still loves you in this world, and the only one you still love... She has given you everything she has. Now, she even has to give up her life for you.

t_ch: 你必须成为圣女，否则，她将在黑潮中死去。
t_en: You have to become the Holy Maiden, or else she'll die in the black tide.

t_ch: 我会成为圣女。
t_en: I will be the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: <size=28>礼赞命运，你终究还是成为了圣女。</size>
t_en: <size=28>Praise destiny, you still became the Holy Maiden.</size>

t_ch: 时间流转，黑潮与死亡也在命运揭示的时刻到来——
t_en: As time marches on, the black tide and death both arrive at the moment revealed by fate...

t_ch: 帕西提亚，你就要死了。
t_en: Pasithea, you're going to die.

t_ch: 随着少女失去意识，来自往昔的旧忆也逐渐消散。
t_en: As she loses consciousness, the memories of the past gradually fades as well.

t_ch: 恍惚间，你似乎听到了熟悉的呼唤。
t_en: Suddenly, you hear a familiar voice calling to you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 终于醒了！你迷迷糊糊地就往这边走，可把人家吓坏了。
t_en: You're finally awake! You were walking this way in a daze, and that scared me!

t_ch: 这应该是最后的天外之音了，把它们带给帕西提亚吧。
t_en: This must be the final echoes from beyond the sky. Bring them to Pasithea.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，是你吗？我听到了你的脚步声，还有它的声音。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, is that you? I heard your footsteps and the Titan's sounds.

t_ch: 我把天外之音带回来了。
t_en: I have brought back the echoes from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 绕了好远的路啊。
t_en: It has been a long way.

t_ch: 感觉看到了好多隐私内容。
t_en: I felt as if I had glimpsed many confidential details.

t_ch: 雅努萨波利斯，竟然还留着这些记忆——真没想到，我会以这样的方式「回顾」自己的过去。
t_en: To think these memories are still held in Janusopolis — never did I imagine I would "recollect" my past in such a way.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属，希望我们能在这些声音里找到它。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin... Let's hope we can find them from these sounds.

t_ch: 帕西提亚将指尖搭上你的耳背，天外之音也沿着她的自白传入你的耳中。
t_en: Pasithea gently places her fingertips on the back of your ear, and the echoes flow into your ears, carrying her confession with them.

t_ch: 就在我们走进奥赫玛的那天夜里，失去双目的我，在梦中听到了天帷之外的回音。
t_en: On the very night we marched into Okhema, I, who had lost my sight, heard an echo from beyond the heavens in my dreams.

t_ch: 一如在神殿中祈祷时那样，在聆听到的瞬间，便能理解其中的意义。这份我拼死挣脱的身份，终究还是……
t_en: Just like a prayer whispered in the temple, I understood the meaning of the echo the moment I heard it. This identity I had fought so hard to escape from... had finally...

t_ch: 不知从何时起，帕西提亚的身边已挤满了前来寻求谕示的市民，仿佛你们所在的并不是奥赫玛，而是过去的命运三相殿。
t_en: At some point, Pasithea found herself surrounded by citizens seeking an oracle. It felt as if you were no longer in Okhema, but transported to the Temple of the Three Fates in the past.

t_ch: 帕西提亚女士，请看看我！您有从泰坦的启示看到我的命运吗？
t_en: Lady Pasithea, please look at me! Did you see my destiny from the Titans' revelation?

t_ch: 大祭司，请您告诉我们，圣女大人究竟得到了怎样的谕示？雅努萨波利斯，不，翁法罗斯的命运，将何去何从？
t_en: High Priest, please tell us. What order did the Holy Maiden receive? As for Janusopolis... no, the destiny of Amphoreus... how would it be?

t_ch: 伟大的传谕梦母，我并无祈愿，仅是来向您表达我们的感谢和敬意。
t_en: O Great Oracle Dreammother, I come not with a wish, but simply to offer our heartfelt gratitude and deepest respect.

t_ch: 命运！伟大的命运会庇佑我们！我们终会战胜死亡和纷争，众神的目光将照耀我们荣耀的前路！
t_en: Fate! Glorious fate will protect us! We will eventually triumph over death and strife. May the gods' gazes shine radiant over our glorious advance!

t_ch: 请您向我们宣告神谕吧，我们愿为泰坦的预言赴汤蹈火。
t_en: Reveal to us the oracle, and we shall dedicate ourselves fully to the prophecies of the Titans.

t_ch: 赞美欧洛尼斯！赞美欧洛尼斯！
t_en: Praise Oronyx! Praise Oronyx!

t_ch: 似乎什么都没有改变。
t_en: It seems like nothing has changed.

t_ch: 各位，今天我休息一天，大家散了吧。
t_en: Everyone, today is my day of rest. Let's reconvene another time.

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 原来是这样解决的吗？
t_en: Is that how it was resolved?

t_ch: 居然能摸鱼？
t_en: She can slack off like this?

t_ch: 随着帕西提亚的通告，耳畔的喧嚣骤然削减了不少。人们吵吵嚷嚷地离开，但并无太多不满。
t_en: At Pasithea's proclamation, the noise in your ears suddenly quieted. The crowd dispersed noisily, yet without much complaint.

t_ch: 帕西提亚女士，您的预言果然没错，我们成功在废墟里找到了一对母女。
t_en: Lady Pasithea, your prophecy was true. We discovered a mother and her daughter in the ruins.

t_ch: 那孩子的身体状况不太乐观，尽快找医生去给她看看为好。
t_en: The child's health is deteriorating. Please find a doctor for her as soon as possible.

t_ch: 传谕梦母大人，我家里的老人最近做了不少甜饼，晚些我给您带点过来。
t_en: O Oracle Dreammother, the elders in my family has recently made some delicious sweet cakes. I shall bring some to you shortly.

t_ch: 那我就不客气了。
t_en: Then I'll gladly accept it.

t_ch: 看您最近都挺憔悴的，干脆过两天我们再去温泉泡泡吧。
t_en: You seem exhausted lately. Let's take a trip to the hot springs again in a few days to recharge.

t_ch: 没问题，我也正想说这事儿……
t_en: Sure. I wanted to suggest that too...

t_ch: 没过一会儿，帕西提亚的周围就回归了不久前的冷清。
t_en: Shortly after, the area around Pasithea returns to the quietness it had moments ago.

t_ch: 命运…身为受欧洛尼斯赐福之人，在你的眼中，命运是什么模样？
t_en: Fate... As one blessed by Oronyx, what do you think fate looks like?

t_ch: 不可违抗的天命。
t_en: An irresistible command from heaven.

t_ch: 自我堕落的借口。
t_en: An excuse for self-degradation.

t_ch: 束缚万物的囚笼。
t_en: A prison that constrains all things.

t_ch: 我曾以为自己挣脱了命运，凭借自己的选择，走向了死亡。
t_en: I used to think I was free from destiny and I walked toward death based on my choices.

t_ch: 可欧洛尼斯的眷属却又引领他们来到神殿，找到了背叛泰坦的圣女。
t_en: But Oronyx's kin led them again to the temple, where they found the Holy Maiden who betrayed the Titans.

t_ch: 现在想来，「帕西提亚」、「骗子」，也许并非那位眷属的指责，不过是对我无谓反抗的讥笑而已。
t_en: Come to think of it, Pasithea and the "liar" may not have been the targets of that kin's accusations, but rather a dismissive sneer at my futile defiance.

t_ch: 但无论如何，我仍想找到那位眷属，从它的口中得到答案——我挣脱了命运吗？还是连挣扎本身也是命运的一部分？
t_en: But no matter what, I am determined to find that kin and seek the answer — Am I truly free from my destiny, or is my struggle for freedom itself a part of my destiny?

t_ch: 天外之音，不知道为什么，这些呓语明明和它毫无关联，但我却从中找到了它的影子。它是一直在等我回去么……
t_en: Echoes from beyond the sky — though these sleeptalk seemed unrelated, I discovered a shadow of the Titan within them. Have they been waiting for my return...?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，麻烦你带我回去一趟。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, please bring me back.

t_ch: 我知道这个要求很任性，在那么危险的地方，还要你带着我这么一个累赘。但…我必须要亲自面对它。
t_en: I understand this is a selfish request — to carry a burden like me through such perilous ground. But... I must witness it myself.

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 稍微等一下。
t_en: Hang on a sec.

t_ch: 好的，我会一直在这里等你。
t_en: No problem. I will wait here for you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你已经准备好了吗？
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, are you ready to go?

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 稍微等一下。
t_en: Hang on a sec.

t_ch: 好的，我会一直在这里等你。
t_en: No problem. I will wait here for you.

t_ch: 熟悉的触感，上一次站在这里是什么时候？我已经记不得了。
t_en: A familiar touch. When was the last time I stood here? I can't even remember.

t_ch: 虽然我曾在这里待了许多的年岁，但绝大部分时间都在神殿的深处度过，真正踏上这片土地的时间反而少之又少。
t_en: I've stayed here for many years, but most of the time was spent in the depths of the temple. The time truly spent walking this land has been rare.

t_ch: 真相，就在我们的面前，我已经听到了它的声音，可……
t_en: The truth is right before our eyes. I can already hear their voice, but...

t_ch: 你在紧张吗？
t_en: Are you nervous?

t_ch: 需要再歇一会吗？
t_en: Do you need a break?

t_ch: 我只是害怕，如果我从未逃出命运。如果{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}看着我背叛它，又看着我被它救起…我不知道该怎么面对。
t_en: I'm fearful. If I really never once escaped destiny, if {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} watched at my betrayal of them, then watched me receiving their salvation... I don't know how to face it all.

t_ch: 我们总要向前的。
t_en: We have to move forward.

t_ch: 命运已经改变了。
t_en: Destiny has already changed.

t_ch: 我会陪你到最后的。
t_en: I'll be with you till the end.

t_ch: 也是，奥赫玛的大家也还在等我回去呢。
t_en: Yes, everyone at Okhema is still waiting for my return.

t_ch: 打开最后的记忆吧，让我们见证欧洛尼斯眷属的真正面目。
t_en: Unravel the final memory. Let us witness the true face of Oronyx's kin.

t_ch: 这些朋友，你们是从其他城邦逃来的吧？黑潮已经无法遏制，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的洪流即将吞没大地上的一切。
t_en: Friends, you all escaped here from other cities, right? The black tide can no longer be contained, and the torrent of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} will swallow the earth whole.

t_ch: 我为什么不害怕？因为我并不畏惧死亡，我是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属，只属于它的星夜。
t_en: Why am I not afraid? For I do not fear death, as I am {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin and belong solely to their starry night.

t_ch: 请不必惊慌，欧洛尼斯派遣我来到这里，正是为了拯救你们。
t_en: Please do not panic. Oronyx sent me here to offer you all salvation.

t_ch: 听好了！屹立在你们面前的，正是命运泰坦的神殿，一直往里走，在废墟的深处，你们会找到一位先知。
t_en: Hear me! Before you stands the temple of the Fate Titans. Walk forth, deep into the ruins, and you shall find a prophet.

t_ch: 她名为<color=#dbc291ff>帕西提亚</color>，把她带出来，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引你们活着到达奥赫玛。
t_en: Her name is <color=#dbc291ff>Pasithea</color>. Bring her out, and she shall bestow you the prophecy of the Fate Titans, ensuring your survival to Okhema.

t_ch: 和圣城卫士说的一样。
t_en: It's exactly what the city guard said...

t_ch: 她究竟是…
t_en: Who exactly is she...

t_ch: 在记忆外的世界，帕西提亚正聆听着这里的声音，你能听到她愈发急促的喘息声。
t_en: In the world beyond memories, Pasithea is listening to the sounds here. You can hear her breaths become increasingly frantic.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯，伟大的命运泰坦，我不奢求您原谅我的罪过。我是最该死的<color=#dbc291ff>骗子</color>，为了自己的私心，不惜让这么多人因我送命。
t_en: Oronyx, the almighty Fate Titan, I beg not for your forgiveness for my sins. I am the most despicable of <color=#dbc291ff>liars</color>, and for my own selfishness, I sacrificed the lives of many innocents.

t_ch: 可是，如果我一言不发，又有谁能去救救她？
t_en: But, if I kept my silence, who will save her?

t_ch: 如果真的有谁应当受到惩罚，只应该是抛弃了她的我，如果我能再努力一点，如果我能不让她挨饿……
t_en: If there's anyone who deserves to be punished, it should be me, the one who abandoned her. If only I tried harder... if only I could have kept her from growing hungry...

t_ch: 如果我带着她逃走，逃去奥赫玛…如果，如果，你在听吗？欧洛尼斯，我可以献上一切，我的心脏，我的眼睛，只要能实现我的祈愿。
t_en: If only I brought her along to escape to Okhema... If only, if only... are you listening? Oronyx, I can offer my everything. My heart, my eyes... as long as you can fulfill my wish.

t_ch: 命运啊，<color=#dbc291ff>请您救救我的女儿</color>。
t_en: O destiny, <color=#dbc291ff>please save my daughter</color>.

t_ch: 残存的回忆消散在了空中，从今以后，帕西提亚的梦里再也不会有「幽灵」的声音了。
t_en: The lingering memories fade into the air. From today on, Pasithea's dreams will not be haunted by the echoes of "the ghost" anymore.

t_ch: 帕西提亚的嘴角向上扭曲，而后又往里凹陷，她死死地咬住牙根，努力压抑住抽泣。
t_en: Pasithea's lips curl up then inwards. She clenches her jaw, fighting to hold back her tears.

t_ch: 我从未想过，真相会是这样。母亲，最后一次见到她的时候，我还不是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女。
t_en: I've never once thought this would be the truth. My mother... the last time I saw her, I wasn't {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Holy Maiden yet.

t_ch: 朋友，我妈妈的身体看起来还好吗？
t_en: My friend, how did my mother's figure look?

t_ch: 很健康。
t_en: Healthy.

t_ch: 很瘦。
t_en: Skinny.

t_ch: 我看不清。
t_en: I couldn't see clearly.

t_ch: 到头来，我们母女二人都成了杜撰神谕的骗子。
t_en: In the end, both my mother and I became liars who fabricated prophecies.

t_ch: 这是出于善意的谎言。
t_en: They were lies out of goodwill.

t_ch: 总能有机会弥补的。
t_en: There will be a chance to make amends.

t_ch: 命运，我一路追逐它来到这里，最后却扑了个空。欧洛尼斯，还有妈妈，我们有成功挣脱自己的命运吗？
t_en: I chased destiny to this point, only to end up with nothing. Oronyx, and my mother... have we truly succeeded in breaking free from our own destinies?

t_ch: 没有人能逃出命运。
t_en: No one can escape destiny.

t_ch: 你们已经超越了命运。
t_en: You have both already transcended destiny.

t_ch: 命运或许并不存在。
t_en: Destiny might not exist after all.

t_ch: 真可笑啊，这个问题困扰了我这么多年，可当我真的找到了真相，却感觉这些都没那么重要了。
t_en: How ridiculous. This question has bothered me for years, yet when I discover the truth, I realize that all these are no longer important.

t_ch: 是啊，无论我们是否身在命运之中，都有无力改变的事情。但只要我们去做了，也总能改变什么。
t_en: Yes, there are always things that we are powerless to change regardless of destiny. However, as long as we take action, we will end up changing some things.

t_ch: 在废墟里，欧洛尼斯从未向我揭示黑潮之后的世界，即使只是一厢情愿，我也愿意相信，是我选择了命运，而非命运选择了我。
t_en: While in the ruins, Oronyx has never revealed to me a world after the black tide. Even if it's blind hope, I also wish to believe that it was I who chose destiny, not the other way around.

t_ch: 妈妈，我现在过得很快乐。
t_en: Mother, I am very happy now.

t_ch: 只是，梦里再也听不到你的声音了，以后多半会…有些寂寞。
t_en: But I can no longer hear your voice in my dreams. In the future... it might get a little lonely.

t_ch: （附近就有一位空闲的圣城卫士，也许他会知道些什么？）
t_en: (There's a city guard nearby that seems free. Maybe he'll know something?)

t_ch: 按照圣城卫士的说法，命运已经决定了你没法见到帕西提亚。
t_en: According to the city guard, destiny has already decided you will not meet Pasithea.

t_ch: 但是，你或许可以选择一些不同寻常的方法，譬如，让某位「伙伴」窥探她的记忆……
t_en: However, you can choose a more unconventional method. For example, letting a fellow companion delve into her memories...

t_ch: 危险的地方，大家都找不到的地方，唔，在哪儿呢……
t_en: A dangerous place, a place hidden from everyone else. Ugh, where is it...

t_ch: 嗅嗅，啊！我想到了！在很高的地方！接近天空的地方！
t_en: *sniff sniff* Ah! I know! An elevated place! A place near the skies!

t_ch: 在这么大一块地方找出{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的天外之音，总觉得还是有点模糊。
t_en: To find {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} echoes from beyond the sky in such a huge place... it feels a little vague.

t_ch: 决定了！就勉为其难地借用一下欧洛尼斯的预言算碑吧。
t_en: It's decided! Let's make do and use Oronyx's prophecy tablet.

t_ch: 来吧，找到了，声音的方向！
t_en: Come on, I found the direction of the sound!

t_ch: 天外之音…原来是这种感觉，明白了！
t_en: Echoes from beyond the sky... So this is how it feels. Got it!

t_ch: 走吧，我们去找下一台预言算碑。
t_en: Let's go. We have to find the next prophecy tablet.

t_ch: 预言，果然很让人在意……
t_en: Sure enough. People really care about prophecies...

t_ch: 继续往前吧，新的天外之音应该就在不远的地方。
t_en: Let's continue forward. New echoes from beyond the sky should be nearby.

t_ch: 遗失的记忆和声音越来越清晰了，就在前面。
t_en: The missing memory and sound are getting clearer. They are right in front.

t_ch: 唔，好刺耳…你也小心一点为好。
t_en: Ugh, it's hurting my ears... You should be more careful too.

t_ch: 就在前面，我已经听到它的声音了！
t_en: It's right ahead! I'm already hearing their voice!

t_ch: 杂乱的回响，像是很多人哭泣的声音……
t_en: It's lots of chaotic echoes... Like the sound of many people crying...

t_ch: 在他的情绪彻底失控前，还是别继续刺激他了。
t_en: Before he loses his temper completely, it's best that you avoid provoking him any further.

t_ch: 你小心搀扶着帕西提亚，走走停停，终于到了天外之音启示的地点。
t_en: You carefully support Pasithea, stopping and starting along the way, until finally reaching the location revealed by the voice from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 塔兰顿在上，你已通过了它的考验，愿律法常在你心。
t_en: By Talanton, you have passed their trial. May laws remain forever within your heart.

t_ch: 塔兰顿在上，你已领悟平衡的法则，愿公正永伴你身。
t_en: By Talanton, you have learned the law of balance. May justice stay forever with you.

t_ch: （祭司们向神明祷告，耳畔是余音回响）
t_en: (The priests offer prayers to the gods, with echoes playing across their ears)

t_ch: （信徒们在蠢动中呼喊，期盼虚假的希望）
t_en: (The believers clamor and shout, clinging to false hope)

t_ch: （城市将崩塌，灾难在哭号中席卷大地）
t_en: (The city is on the brink of collapse. Disaster sweeps the land to the symphony of wails)

t_ch: （黑潮摧毁了一切，疲惫的人正等待死亡）
t_en: (The black tide destroys everything, and the exhausted linger in wait for death)

t_ch: （来自过去的幻影，变得越来越清晰了……）
t_en: (The illusions of the past are getting clearer and clearer...)

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}的意思是，你想将《如我所书》的文本大规模复印，当作书籍出版？
t_en: ...So, {NICKNAME}, you're saying you want to mass print the text of As I've Written and publish it as a book?

t_ch: 想法不错。只是，在星际网络发表的出版物，都必须借助公司的渠道。我不确定他们对此什么态度。
t_en: Not a bad idea. However, any publication on the Interastral Network must go through the IPC's channels. I'm not sure how they'd feel about this.

t_ch: 别担心，我们有盟友。
t_en: Don't worry, we have allies.

t_ch: 于情于理，有办法说服。
t_en: One way or another, they can be persuaded.

t_ch: 企划内容，我们已经跟业务巩固部聊过了。结论是：批准执行。
t_en: We've already discussed the details of this project with the Business Consolidation Department. The verdict is: approved for execution.

t_ch: 这方案能谈下来，多亏了雅利洛-Ⅵ的经验。比起短期利益，树立一个「存护」的典范更有助于长线发展。
t_en: Thanks to our experience in Jarilo-VI, we were able to close this deal. Rather than focusing on short-term gains, establishing a model of "Preservation" will be more beneficial for long-term development.

t_ch: 何况为襁褓中的文明保驾护航，本就是战略投资部的天职——根据拉帝奥教授的说法，稳固银河对翁法罗斯的共同认知，一定程度上有助于它的未来。
t_en: Besides, safeguarding new and growing civilizations is precisely what the Strategic Investment Department was made to do. According to Dr. Ratio, establishing a consistent understanding of Amphoreus across the cosmos will aid its future, to a certain degree.

t_ch: 就是这样。星际和平娱乐会操办《如我所书》的出版事宜，相关费用也由公司一并承担。
t_en: That's right. The Interastral Peace Entertainment will handle the publication of As I've Written, and the IPC will cover all related expenses.

t_ch: 至于和各个星球接洽的部分，就交给无名客了。
t_en: As for liaising with the various planets, we'll leave that to the Nameless.

t_ch: 看来，你早就做好准备了。真不愧翁法罗斯的「全世之座」。
t_en: I see you've long been prepared. As expected of the "Throne of Worlds" of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 也许过不了多久，列车就该孩子们挑大梁了啊。
t_en: Perhaps soon it'll be time for the young ones to take charge of the Express.

t_ch: 呵…别发出这么老气横秋的感慨，瓦尔特——我们都还年轻呢。
t_en: Heh... Don't sound so world-weary, Welt. We've got plenty of youth left.

t_ch: 虽说有公司帮忙，但依你的性格，肯定想亲自跑一趟，对吧？
t_en: Even though the IPC is helping out, knowing you, you'd definitely want to go check it out yourself, right?

t_ch: 那就去吧，去播撒文明的种子，创造属于你的故事。
t_en: Go ahead then, and sow the seeds of civilization. Create a story that belongs to you.
